case_title: CACH LLC VS. JASON GEE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION REGARDING CONTRACT COPY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, JASON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-05-2011
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED LETTER TO DEBTOR, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC SERVED SEP-07-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, JASON
DECLARATION OF INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-27-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $460.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, JASON
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, JASON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC SERVED SEP-07-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, JASON
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, JASON
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-27-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, JASON
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-23-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $460.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, JASON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEE, JASON $23,558.55 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $460.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,818.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
